name: Pumpkin Frangelico Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine gingersnaps and sugar in a food processor. Process until fine.
2. With the machine running, add melted butter and process until crumbly.
3. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Freeze for 20 minutes.
4. In a food processor or by hand, beat cream cheese, pumpkin, eggs, sugar, 1/2 cup Frangelico, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, cloves, and vanilla until completely smooth.
5. Pour filling into the prepared crust and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, whisk together sour cream, granulated sugar, and Frangelico for topping.
7. Carefully pour topping over hot cake, smoothing with a spatula.
8. Bake for an additional 10-15 minutes or until edges begin to bubble.
9. Remove from oven, cool completely, and refrigerate overnight.
10. To serve, run a knife around the edge of the cake and release the springform pan.
11. Transfer to a serving platter. Decorate with whipped cream and whole hazelnuts.
12. Allow cake to reach room temperature for 45 minutes before serving to enhance flavor.
